backstory.original: Being telepathic means Solaak knows who to trust-and that's not many people. But when the kalashtar finds the soul of a dragon trapped in a chasm, they form a bond of trust like no other. Solaak rides their dragon mentor, Tempest, into battle, unstoppable together.
backstory.display: 拥有读心术能力，意味着索剌克清楚谁值得信任--虽然这样的对象并不多。但当这名卡拉史塔人发现大峡谷中囚禁的巨龙魂魄后，他们结成了无与伦比的信任纽带。索剌克骑着他们的巨龙导师坦皮斯特投入战斗，二者协力所向披靡。

description.original: Solaak fires an arrow at the closest enemy, dealing damage and knocking it back a short distance.
description.display: 索剌克向最近的敌人发射一支箭矢，造成伤害并将该敌人短距离击退。

description.original: Solaak and Tempest fly over the enemies, while Tempest breaths lightning breath dealing damage, stunning, and knocking the enemies back.
description.display: 索剌克和坦皮斯特飞过敌人，同时坦皮斯特放出闪电吐息，造成伤害、眩晕，同时将敌人击退。

longDescription.original: Solaak flies over the enemies on Tempest's back while Tempest breaths lightning breath on the enemies below dealing damage, stunning, and knocking them back.
longDescription.display: 索剌克乘着坦皮斯特飞过敌人，同时坦皮斯特对下方敌人放出闪电吐息，造成伤害、眩晕，同时将他们击退。

description.original: Solaak increases the damage of Champions with Ranged Attacks
description.display: 索剌克提升使用远程攻击的勇士的伤害

description.original: Solaak increases the outgoing damage of Champions with Ranged Attacks
description.display: 索剌克提升使用远程攻击的勇士的输出伤害

description.desc: $(source_hero)'s pet pseudodragon Levits takes $(source_hero)'s slot in the formation while $(source_hero) rides his drake companion, Tempest, into battle. He attacks from Tempest. If Levits is knocked out by enemies, $(source_hero) and Tempest retreat from the battlefield until you change areas.
$(source_hero)的宠物伪龙雷维兹占据$(source_hero)在阵型中的位置，而$(source_hero)本人则骑着飞龙伙伴坦皮斯特投入战斗。他从坦皮斯特身上发动攻击。如果雷维兹被敌人击倒，则$(source_hero)和坦皮斯特撤离战场，直到改变区域。

$(source_hero) gains a Reach stack for each Champion with a ranged base attack in the formation. Each stack increases the damage of these Champions by $(not_buffed amount)%, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每位拥有远程基本攻击的勇士均使$(source_hero)获得一层“触及”堆叠。每层堆叠均使这些勇士的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Solaak increases the damage of ranged Champions based on the number of ranged Champions in the formation.
tipText.display: 索剌克根据阵型中远程勇士的数量来提高所有远程勇士的伤害。

description.desc: The effect of $(upgrade_name id) is increased by $(not_buffed amount)% each time an enemy is knocked back, stacking multiplicatively to a max of $(max_stacks) stacks. Stacks reset when changing areas.
每当一名敌人被击退，$(upgrade_name id)的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式最多堆叠 $(max_stacks) 层。改变区域时重置堆叠。

$(source_hero) increases the effect of the outgoing positional formation abilities of all Champions with a ranged base attack by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Reach stack he has, stacking additively.

effect_keys.override_key_desc: Increases the effect of $target's outgoing Positional Formation Abilities by $amount%

description.desc: $(source_hero)使所有具备远程基本攻击的勇士提供的位置阵型技能的效果提高，每层触及堆叠提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以加算方式堆叠。

effect_keys.override_key_desc: 使$target提供的位置阵型技能的效果提高 $amount%

tipText.original: Solaak increases the effect of outgoing positional formation abilities of ranged champions.
tipText.display: 索剌克提高远程勇士提供的位置阵型技能效果。

description.desc: Each time a Champion with a ranged base attack attacks there is a 5% chance per stack of Reach that their base attack cooldown is instantly reset.

effect_keys.override_key_desc: Gives a $(amount)% chance to instantly reset $target's attack cooldown right after using it

description.desc: 每当具备远程基本攻击的勇士发动攻击时，每层触及堆叠均有 5% 的几率使其基本攻击冷却时间立即重置。

effect_keys.override_key_desc: 有 $(amount)% 的几率使$target在使用攻击后立即重置其冷却时间

description.desc: $(source_hero)'s base attack speed is reduced by $(seconds_plural amount). Additionally, the effect of $(upgrade_name id___2) is increased to $(new_amount___2)% per stack.
$(source_hero)的基本攻击速度降低 $(seconds_plural amount)。此外，每层堆叠均使$(upgrade_name id___2)的效果提高 $(new_amount___2)%。

specializationDescription.original: Solaak focuses on knockbacks and the speed of his attacks
specializationDescription.display: 索剌克专注于反击和攻击速度

description.desc: $(source_hero)'s normal attack deals damage to all enemies in a small radius and all enemies hit take an additional $(debuff_amount)% damage for $(debuff_duration) seconds.
$(source_hero)的普通攻击对小范围内的所有敌人造成伤害，所有命中的敌人额外受到 $(debuff_amount)% 的伤害，持续 $(debuff_duration) 秒。

specializationDescription.original: Solaak imbues his attacks with Tempest's Lightning magic, adding AOE damage
specializationDescription.display: 索剌克在攻击中注入坦皮斯特的闪电魔法，增加范围伤害

description.desc: Each formation slot occupied by an escort adds 1 Reach stack for $(upgrade_name id).
护卫占据的每个阵型栏位均为$(upgrade_name id)增加 1 层触及堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Solaak trusts those escorted like his ranged bretheren
specializationDescription.display: 索剌克像对待远程兄弟一样信任他所护卫的对象

description.original: I won't let you go alone.
description.display: 我不会让你孤身奋战的。

description.original: I can't imagine being alone -- so I won't abandon you either.
description.display: 我无法想象孤身一人，所以我也不会抛弃你。

description.original: Tempest and I will attack from the air!
description.display: 坦皮斯特和我将从空中进攻！

description.original: When you're high up, you can see the best way to proceed!
description.display: 身处高空可以看到最优途径！

description.original: No one ever sees it coming.
This should buy us some time to press the attack!
description.display: 这应该能为我们争取推进的时间！

description.original: The time to strike is now!
Some say we're one and the same.
description.display: 有人说，我们虽双身但一体。
相信我，我们可以搞定的。

character_sheet_details.backstory: Being telepathic means Solaak knows who to trust-and that's not many people. But when the kalashtar finds the soul of a dragon trapped in a chasm, they form a bond of trust like no other. Solaak rides their dragon mentor, Tempest, into battle, unstoppable together.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Solaak is a Support Champion who greatly boosts formations with ranged Champions

event_upgrades.name: Critical Mass
event_upgrades.description: Solaak increases the outgoing damage of Champions with Ranged Attacks
